title: 「Would rather X (than B)」句型
titleEn: Using Would rather X (than B) to express preference

source.file: Sentence Structure 70 -「Would rather X (than B)」表達偏好.pdf
omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Subject + would rather + base verb + A + than + base verb + B

formulas.formula: Subject + would rather + base verb + A + than + base verb + B

formulas.labelZh: 兩個選項使用相同動詞
formulas.formula: Subject + would rather + base verb + object A + than + object B
Subject + would rather not + base verb + other information

example: I would rather watch a movie than watch a Netflix show.
exampleZh: 我寧願看一部電影，也不願看 Netflix 節目。

examples.en: I would rather watch a movie than watch a Netflix show.
examples.zh: 我寧願看一部電影，也不願看 Netflix 節目。
examples.highlight: would rather watch a movie than watch

examples.en: I would rather watch a movie than a Netflix show.
examples.zh: 我寧願看一部電影，也不願看 Netflix 節目。
examples.highlight: would rather watch a movie than

examples.en: I would rather not go out tonight.

meaning.zh: Would rather 用來直接表達較喜歡的選擇；比較兩項行動時，以 than 引出較不喜歡的選項。

rules.en: Use the base form of the verb after would rather, without to.
rules.zh: Would rather 後面使用原形動詞，不使用 to。

rules.en: Use than when comparing two actions, and do not confuse it with then.
rules.zh: 比較兩個行動時使用 than；不要把 than 誤寫成表示時間次序的 then。
examples: She would rather walk than take the bus.

rules.en: Keep the verb forms on both sides of than parallel, normally using a base verb for both actions.
rules.zh: Than 前後的動詞形式應互相配合；兩個行動均應使用原形動詞。
examples: They would rather cook than order takeaway.

rules.en: Place not after rather in the negative form.
rules.zh: 否定形式把 not 放在 rather 後面。
examples: I would rather not discuss it now.

rules.en: This exercise teaches choices made by the same subject and does not include the advanced different-subject pattern.
rules.zh: 本練習只教授同一主語作出選擇，不包括 I would rather you stayed home 之類的不同主語句型。

rules.en: Would rather expresses preference; sentence-initial Rather, is a linking expression meaning ‘more precisely’, ‘instead’ or ‘actually’.
rules.zh: Would rather 表達個人偏好；句首的 Rather, 是連接語，意思接近「更準確地說」、「相反」或「其實」，兩者並不相同。
examples: I would rather stay home than go shopping.
Life should not be about others. Rather, it is about how we choose to live our lives.

benefits.en: It places the preferred and less preferred choices in one sentence, making the preference immediately clear.
benefits.zh: 這個句型把較喜歡和較不喜歡的選項放在同一句中，讓別人立即明白你的選擇。

benefits.en: It connects two alternatives concisely instead of using two separate sentences.
benefits.zh: 你可以把兩個選項簡潔地連接起來，不需要分開寫成兩句。

benefits.en: The frame I would rather... than... makes everyday answers more natural and easy to organise.
benefits.zh: 別人問你想吃甚麼、去哪裏或如何完成工作時，I would rather... than... 是容易使用的自然回答框架。

benefits.en: It states a choice without directly criticising the other option.
benefits.zh: 它只表示你較喜歡某個選項，不一定批評另一個選項，因此通常比直接表達厭惡更溫和。

benefits.en: It is useful for explaining decisions and trade-offs in essays, discussions, meetings and daily life.
benefits.zh: 在作文、討論、會議或日常決策中，可以用這個句型說明自己願意接受哪個選項，以避免較差的結果。

benefits.en: It provides an alternative to repeatedly using prefer.
benefits.zh: 除了反覆使用 I prefer，也可以使用 I would rather，增加口語和寫作的句式變化。

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using would rather + base verb, adding than when two choices are given.
Use the full form would rather instead of the contraction ’d rather.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 would rather + 原形動詞 改寫以下句子。題目提供兩個選擇時，請加入 than。
請使用完整形式 would rather，不要使用縮寫 ’d rather。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: I prefer to walk to school instead of taking the bus.
questions.promptZh: 我較喜歡步行上學，而不是乘搭巴士。
questions.answer: I would rather walk to school than take the bus.
questions.answerZh: 我寧願步行上學，也不願乘搭巴士。
questions.highlight: I would rather walk to school than take the bus.

questions.prompt: Mia prefers reading a book to watching television.
questions.promptZh: 米婭較喜歡看書，而不是看電視。
questions.answer: Mia would rather read a book than watch television.
questions.answerZh: 米婭寧願看書，也不願看電視。
questions.highlight: Mia would rather read a book than watch television.

questions.prompt: Ben would prefer to drink water instead of having a fizzy drink.
questions.promptZh: 本較想喝水，而不是喝汽水。
questions.answer: Ben would rather drink water than have a fizzy drink.
questions.answerZh: 本寧願喝水，也不願喝汽水。
questions.highlight: Ben would rather drink water than have a fizzy drink.

questions.prompt: If we can choose, we will eat at home, not go to a restaurant.
questions.promptZh: 如果我們可以選擇，我們會在家吃飯，而不會去餐廳。
questions.answer: We would rather eat at home than go to a restaurant.
questions.answerZh: 我們寧願在家吃飯，也不願去餐廳。
questions.highlight: We would rather eat at home than go to a restaurant.

questions.prompt: Leo has two options. His first choice is to play football, not stay indoors.
questions.promptZh: 里奧有兩個選擇。他的首選是踢足球，而不是留在室內。
questions.answer: Leo would rather play football than stay indoors.
questions.answerZh: 里奧寧願踢足球，也不願留在室內。
questions.highlight: Leo would rather play football than stay indoors.

questions.prompt: My sister prefers using a pencil to using a pen.
questions.promptZh: 我的妹妹較喜歡用鉛筆，而不是用原子筆。
questions.answer: My sister would rather use a pencil than use a pen.
questions.answerZh: 我的妹妹寧願用鉛筆，也不願用原子筆。
questions.highlight: My sister would rather use a pencil than use a pen.

questions.prompt: Which place would the children prefer to visit? They would choose the zoo instead of the museum.
questions.promptZh: 孩子們較想參觀哪個地方？他們會選擇動物園，而不是博物館。
questions.answer: The children would rather visit the zoo than visit the museum.
questions.answerZh: 孩子們寧願參觀動物園，也不願參觀博物館。
questions.highlight: The children would rather visit the zoo than visit the museum.

questions.prompt: Of these two shirts, I would choose the blue one instead of the red one.
questions.promptZh: 這兩件恤衫之中，我會選擇藍色那件，而不選紅色那件。
questions.answer: I would rather buy the blue shirt than buy the red one.
questions.answerZh: 我寧願購買藍色恤衫，也不願購買紅色那件。
questions.highlight: I would rather buy the blue shirt than buy the red one.

questions.prompt: Amy finds listening to music more enjoyable than playing a computer game.
questions.promptZh: 艾米覺得聽音樂比玩電腦遊戲更有趣。
questions.answer: Amy would rather listen to music than play a computer game.
questions.answerZh: 艾米寧願聽音樂，也不願玩電腦遊戲。
questions.highlight: Amy would rather listen to music than play a computer game.

questions.prompt: For this activity, the students want to work in pairs, not alone.
questions.promptZh: 這次活動中，學生想二人一組工作，而不想獨自工作。
questions.answer: The students would rather work in pairs than work alone.
questions.answerZh: 學生寧願二人一組工作，也不願獨自工作。
questions.highlight: The students would rather work in pairs than work alone.

questions.prompt: Daniel would prefer to leave early because he does not want to miss the last train.
questions.promptZh: 丹尼爾較想提早離開，因為他不想錯過尾班車。
questions.answer: Daniel would rather leave early than miss the last train.
questions.answerZh: 丹尼爾寧願提早離開，也不願錯過尾班車。
questions.highlight: Daniel would rather leave early than miss the last train.

questions.prompt: Grace would choose to cook dinner instead of ordering takeaway.
questions.promptZh: 格蕾絲會選擇煮晚餐，而不是叫外賣。
questions.answer: Grace would rather cook dinner than order takeaway.
questions.answerZh: 格蕾絲寧願煮晚餐，也不願叫外賣。
questions.highlight: Grace would rather cook dinner than order takeaway.

questions.prompt: The team’s preference is to practise outside instead of using the small gym.
questions.promptZh: 球隊的選擇是在戶外練習，而不是使用細小的體育館。
questions.answer: The team would rather practise outside than use the small gym.
questions.answerZh: 球隊寧願在戶外練習，也不願使用細小的體育館。
questions.highlight: The team would rather practise outside than use the small gym.

questions.prompt: Our neighbours want to keep the old tree. They do not want to cut it down.
questions.promptZh: 我們的鄰居想保留那棵老樹。他們不想把它砍掉。
questions.answer: Our neighbours would rather keep the old tree than cut it down.
questions.answerZh: 我們的鄰居寧願保留那棵老樹，也不願把它砍掉。
questions.highlight: Our neighbours would rather keep the old tree than cut it down.

questions.prompt: How would Chloe prefer to contact her friend? She would send a message instead of making a phone call.
questions.promptZh: 克洛伊較想怎樣聯絡朋友？她會傳訊息，而不是打電話。
questions.answer: Chloe would rather send a message than make a phone call.
questions.answerZh: 克洛伊寧願傳訊息，也不願打電話。
questions.highlight: Chloe would rather send a message than make a phone call.

questions.prompt: The tourists would choose to take the train instead of flying.
questions.promptZh: 遊客會選擇乘搭火車，而不是乘搭飛機。
questions.answer: The tourists would rather take the train than fly.
questions.answerZh: 遊客寧願乘搭火車，也不願乘搭飛機。
questions.highlight: The tourists would rather take the train than fly.

questions.prompt: My father prefers repairing the chair to buying a new one.
questions.promptZh: 我的父親較喜歡修理椅子，而不是買一張新的椅子。
questions.answer: My father would rather repair the chair than buy a new one.
questions.answerZh: 我的父親寧願修理椅子，也不願購買一張新的椅子。
questions.highlight: My father would rather repair the chair than buy a new one.

questions.prompt: Sarah does not want to go out in the heavy rain.
questions.promptZh: 莎拉不想在大雨中外出。
questions.answer: Sarah would rather not go out in the heavy rain.
questions.answerZh: 莎拉寧願不在大雨中外出。
questions.highlight: Sarah would rather not go out in the heavy rain.

questions.prompt: The class’s preferred date for the test is Friday, not Monday.
questions.promptZh: 班上較希望在星期五測驗，而不是星期一。
questions.answer: The class would rather have the test on Friday than have it on Monday.
questions.answerZh: 班上寧願在星期五測驗，也不願在星期一測驗。
questions.highlight: The class would rather have the test on Friday than have it on Monday.

questions.prompt: Jason needs a camera for only one day. He would prefer to borrow one instead of buying one.
questions.promptZh: 傑森只需要使用相機一天。他較想借一部，而不是買一部。
questions.answer: Jason would rather borrow a camera than buy one.
questions.answerZh: 傑森寧願借一部相機，也不願購買一部。
questions.highlight: Jason would rather borrow a camera than buy one.

questions.prompt: Olivia does not want to drive in dangerous weather.
questions.promptZh: 奧莉花不想在危險的天氣下駕駛。
questions.answer: Olivia would rather not drive in dangerous weather.
questions.answerZh: 奧莉花寧願不在危險的天氣下駕駛。
questions.highlight: Olivia would rather not drive in dangerous weather.

questions.prompt: What approach would the nurse prefer? She would explain the treatment slowly instead of confusing the patient.
questions.promptZh: 護士較喜歡採用甚麼方法？她會慢慢解釋治療，而不想令病人感到混亂。
questions.answer: The nurse would rather explain the treatment slowly than confuse the patient.
questions.answerZh: 護士寧願慢慢解釋治療，也不願令病人感到混亂。
questions.highlight: The nurse would rather explain the treatment slowly than confuse the patient.

questions.prompt: The manager would choose to delay the launch instead of releasing an unsafe product.
questions.promptZh: 經理會選擇延遲推出產品，而不是推出不安全的產品。
questions.answer: The manager would rather delay the launch than release an unsafe product.
questions.answerZh: 經理寧願延遲推出產品，也不願推出不安全的產品。
questions.highlight: The manager would rather delay the launch than release an unsafe product.

questions.prompt: We prefer reusing the boxes to throwing them away.
questions.promptZh: 我們較喜歡重用這些紙箱，而不是把它們丟掉。
questions.answer: We would rather reuse the boxes than throw them away.
questions.answerZh: 我們寧願重用這些紙箱，也不願把它們丟掉。
questions.highlight: We would rather reuse the boxes than throw them away.

questions.prompt: The school does not want to replace every window this year.
questions.promptZh: 學校不想在今年更換所有窗戶。
questions.answer: The school would rather not replace every window this year.
questions.answerZh: 學校寧願不在今年更換所有窗戶。
questions.highlight: The school would rather not replace every window this year.

questions.prompt: Ethan believes that asking for help is a better choice than making another mistake.
questions.promptZh: 伊森認為尋求協助比再次犯錯是更好的選擇。
questions.answer: Ethan would rather ask for help than make another mistake.
questions.answerZh: 伊森寧願尋求協助，也不願再次犯錯。
questions.highlight: Ethan would rather ask for help than make another mistake.

questions.prompt: Maya’s choice is to keep her personal details private, not post them online.
questions.promptZh: 瑪雅的選擇是把個人資料保密，而不是把它們上載到網上。
questions.answer: Maya would rather keep her personal details private than post them online.
questions.answerZh: 瑪雅寧願把個人資料保密，也不願把它們上載到網上。
questions.highlight: Maya would rather keep her personal details private than post them online.

questions.prompt: The shop would choose to offer a refund because losing the customer’s trust would be worse.
questions.promptZh: 店舖會選擇退款，因為失去顧客的信任會造成更壞的結果。
questions.answer: The shop would rather offer a refund than lose the customer’s trust.
questions.answerZh: 店舖寧願退款，也不願失去顧客的信任。
questions.highlight: The shop would rather offer a refund than lose the customer’s trust.

questions.prompt: What do the hikers want to avoid? They do not want to continue after dark.
questions.promptZh: 遠足人士想避免甚麼？他們不想在天黑後繼續前進。
questions.answer: The hikers would rather not continue after dark.
questions.answerZh: 遠足人士寧願不在天黑後繼續前進。
questions.highlight: The hikers would rather not continue after dark.

questions.prompt: My plan is to save for a good laptop instead of buying a cheap one now.
questions.promptZh: 我的計劃是儲錢購買一部優質手提電腦，而不是現在購買便宜的型號。
questions.answer: I would rather save for a good laptop than buy a cheap one now.
questions.answerZh: 我寧願儲錢購買一部優質手提電腦，也不願現在購買便宜的型號。
questions.highlight: I would rather save for a good laptop than buy a cheap one now.

questions.prompt: The doctor would choose to monitor the patient overnight instead of sending her home too soon.
questions.promptZh: 醫生會選擇留院觀察病人一晚，而不是太早讓她回家。
questions.answer: The doctor would rather monitor the patient overnight than send her home too soon.
questions.answerZh: 醫生寧願留院觀察病人一晚，也不願太早讓她回家。
questions.highlight: The doctor would rather monitor the patient overnight than send her home too soon.

questions.prompt: The council prefers repairing the playground to closing it permanently.
questions.promptZh: 區議會較希望修理遊樂場，而不是永久關閉它。
questions.answer: The council would rather repair the playground than close it permanently.
questions.answerZh: 區議會寧願修理遊樂場，也不願永久關閉它。
questions.highlight: The council would rather repair the playground than close it permanently.

questions.prompt: Given a choice, our group would prefer to present first instead of waiting nervously all afternoon.
questions.promptZh: 如果可以選擇，我們的小組較想先作匯報，而不是整個下午緊張地等待。
questions.answer: Our group would rather present first than wait nervously all afternoon.
questions.answerZh: 我們的小組寧願先作匯報，也不願整個下午緊張地等待。
questions.highlight: Our group would rather present first than wait nervously all afternoon.

questions.prompt: Which option would Nina choose? She would take a later flight instead of rushing through the airport.
questions.promptZh: 妮娜會選擇哪個方案？她會乘搭較遲的航班，而不是匆忙趕過機場。
questions.answer: Nina would rather take a later flight than rush through the airport.
questions.answerZh: 妮娜寧願乘搭較遲的航班，也不願匆忙趕過機場。
questions.highlight: Nina would rather take a later flight than rush through the airport.

questions.prompt: The chef’s chosen response would be to change the menu instead of serving food that is not fresh.
questions.promptZh: 廚師會選擇更改餐單，而不是供應不新鮮的食物。
questions.answer: The chef would rather change the menu than serve food that is not fresh.
questions.answerZh: 廚師寧願更改餐單，也不願供應不新鮮的食物。
questions.highlight: The chef would rather change the menu than serve food that is not fresh.

questions.prompt: The company considers training its current staff a better option than hiring a completely new team.
questions.promptZh: 公司認為培訓現有員工比聘請一支全新的團隊更好。
questions.answer: The company would rather train its current staff than hire a completely new team.
questions.answerZh: 公司寧願培訓現有員工，也不願聘請一支全新的團隊。
questions.highlight: The company would rather train its current staff than hire a completely new team.

questions.prompt: In this situation, you would prefer to check the address twice instead of sending the parcel to the wrong place.
questions.promptZh: 在這種情況下，你較想再次核對地址，而不是把包裹寄到錯誤的地方。
questions.answer: You would rather check the address twice than send the parcel to the wrong place.
questions.answerZh: 你寧願再次核對地址，也不願把包裹寄到錯誤的地方。
questions.highlight: You would rather check the address twice than send the parcel to the wrong place.

questions.prompt: The volunteers’ preferred approach is to collect reusable items instead of asking people for money.
questions.promptZh: 義工較喜歡收集可重用物品，而不是向人們募捐。
questions.answer: The volunteers would rather collect reusable items than ask people for money.
questions.answerZh: 義工寧願收集可重用物品，也不願向人們募捐。
questions.highlight: The volunteers would rather collect reusable items than ask people for money.

questions.prompt: The family would choose to move to a smaller flat instead of living far from work and school.
questions.promptZh: 這個家庭會選擇搬到較小的單位，而不是住在遠離工作地點和學校的地方。
questions.answer: The family would rather move to a smaller flat than live far from work and school.
questions.answerZh: 這個家庭寧願搬到較小的單位，也不願住在遠離工作地點和學校的地方。
questions.highlight: The family would rather move to a smaller flat than live far from work and school.

questions.prompt: Marcus considers discussing the problem calmly preferable to arguing in front of everyone.
questions.promptZh: 馬庫斯認為冷靜討論問題比在眾人面前爭吵更好。
questions.answer: Marcus would rather discuss the problem calmly than argue in front of everyone.
questions.answerZh: 馬庫斯寧願冷靜討論問題，也不願在眾人面前爭吵。
questions.highlight: Marcus would rather discuss the problem calmly than argue in front of everyone.

questions.prompt: The hospital would choose to reschedule non-urgent appointments instead of reducing emergency services.
questions.promptZh: 醫院會選擇重新安排非緊急預約，而不是削減緊急服務。
questions.answer: The hospital would rather reschedule non-urgent appointments than reduce emergency services.
questions.answerZh: 醫院寧願重新安排非緊急預約，也不願削減緊急服務。
questions.highlight: The hospital would rather reschedule non-urgent appointments than reduce emergency services.

questions.prompt: Sofia would prefer to admit that she needs more time instead of submitting careless work.
questions.promptZh: 蘇菲亞較想承認自己需要更多時間，而不是提交馬虎的作品。
questions.answer: Sofia would rather admit that she needs more time than submit careless work.
questions.answerZh: 蘇菲亞寧願承認自己需要更多時間，也不願提交馬虎的作品。
questions.highlight: Sofia would rather admit that she needs more time than submit careless work.

questions.prompt: The organisers would choose to move the event indoors instead of cancelling it because of the storm.
questions.promptZh: 主辦單位會選擇把活動移到室內，而不是因為暴風雨而取消活動。
questions.answer: The organisers would rather move the event indoors than cancel it because of the storm.
questions.answerZh: 主辦單位寧願把活動移到室內，也不願因為暴風雨而取消活動。
questions.highlight: The organisers would rather move the event indoors than cancel it because of the storm.

questions.prompt: The research team does not want to report a result that they cannot verify.
questions.promptZh: 研究團隊不想公布一項無法核實的結果。
questions.answer: The research team would rather not report a result they cannot verify.
questions.answerZh: 研究團隊寧願不公布一項無法核實的結果。
questions.highlight: The research team would rather not report a result they cannot verify.

questions.prompt: What would the passengers prefer to do? They would wait for a safety check instead of boarding a plane with a possible fault.
questions.promptZh: 乘客較想怎樣做？他們會等待安全檢查，而不是登上一架可能有故障的飛機。
questions.answer: The passengers would rather wait for a safety check than board a plane with a possible fault.
questions.answerZh: 乘客寧願等待安全檢查，也不願登上一架可能有故障的飛機。
questions.highlight: The passengers would rather wait for a safety check than board a plane with a possible fault.

questions.prompt: Which change would the school prefer? It would adjust the timetable instead of asking students to attend an extra day.
questions.promptZh: 學校較希望作出哪項改動？學校會調整時間表，而不是要求學生額外上課一天。
questions.answer: The school would rather adjust the timetable than ask students to attend an extra day.
questions.answerZh: 學校寧願調整時間表，也不願要求學生額外上課一天。
questions.highlight: The school would rather adjust the timetable than ask students to attend an extra day.

questions.prompt: To distribute the stock fairly, the local shop would choose to limit each customer’s purchase instead of allowing one person to buy everything.
questions.promptZh: 為了公平分配存貨，本地店舖會限制每名顧客的購買數量，而不是讓一個人買下所有貨品。
questions.answer: The local shop would rather limit each customer’s purchase than allow one person to buy all the stock.
questions.answerZh: 本地店舖寧願限制每名顧客的購買數量，也不願讓一個人買下所有存貨。
questions.highlight: The local shop would rather limit each customer’s purchase than allow one person to buy all the stock.

questions.prompt: The project team sees simplifying one feature as a better option than delaying the whole service.
questions.promptZh: 項目團隊認為簡化一項功能比延遲整項服務更好。
questions.answer: The project team would rather simplify one feature than delay the whole service.
questions.answerZh: 項目團隊寧願簡化一項功能，也不願延遲整項服務。
questions.highlight: The project team would rather simplify one feature than delay the whole service.

questions.prompt: The parents prefer discussing the issue with the teacher to complaining about it online.
questions.promptZh: 家長較希望與老師討論問題，而不是在網上投訴。
questions.answer: The parents would rather discuss the issue with the teacher than complain about it online.
questions.answerZh: 家長寧願與老師討論問題，也不願在網上投訴。
questions.highlight: The parents would rather discuss the issue with the teacher than complain about it online.

questions.prompt: To avoid unnecessary danger, the museum would choose to close one gallery temporarily instead of putting visitors and valuable objects at risk.
questions.promptZh: 為了避免不必要的危險，博物館會選擇暫時關閉一個展館，而不是讓訪客和珍貴物品承受風險。
questions.answer: The museum would rather close one gallery temporarily than put visitors and valuable objects at risk.
questions.answerZh: 博物館寧願暫時關閉一個展館，也不願讓訪客和珍貴物品承受風險。
questions.highlight: The museum would rather close one gallery temporarily than put visitors and valuable objects at risk.
